subcodes.first_line: O thou musk-scented pilgrim! The interpretation of thy vision is that souls shall arise, intent upon approaching the Fire of God enkindled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس رویا تعبیرش آنست که نفوسی قصد آن نمایند تا نار الله الموقده
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of dreams and visions, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
